instruction: Implement word_count(s): return the number of whitespace-separated words in s. word_count('hello world') == 2, word_count('  a  b c ') == 3, word_count('') == 0.

files.test_wc.py:
from wc import word_count


def test_word_count():
    assert word_count('hello world') == 2
    assert word_count('  a  b c ') == 3
    assert word_count('') == 0
